description: Histologically confirmed advanced non-small-cell lung cancer
Documented activating EGFR mutation by central biomarker testing
ECOG performance status 0 or 1 at screening
At least 21 days washout since last systemic anti-cancer therapy
Radiographically confirmed RECIST 1.1 progression on prior line
More than two prior lines of systemic therapy excludes
ECOG performance status 3 or worse excludes
